source_of_truth: This file is the editable source of truth for Role Fit title and capability normalization.

entry_contract.concept_id: Stable semantic concept shared across languages.
entry_contract.keywords: Terms that strengthen retrieval but do not prove a match alone.
entry_contract.related_titles: Nearby concepts that require context before mapping.
entry_contract.not_equivalent: Terms that must not be treated as automatic equivalents.
entry_contract.context_signals: Responsibilities or domains that help disambiguate the concept.
